name: Airtable
tagline: Spreadsheet-database hybrid — bases, tables, records, automations.
security: Personal Access Tokens (PATs) replaced legacy API keys — scope them per-base.
Use the minimum scopes (data.records:read vs write) needed for the integration.
Webhooks require subscribing via API and processing notifications via short polls (pull model).
Field IDs change if a field is renamed in some cases — prefer field IDs over names for stable integrations.

patterns.name: Form to base
patterns.description: Capture form submissions into an Airtable base as records.

patterns.name: Base as CMS
patterns.description: Query an Airtable base from your app to serve content.

patterns.name: Webhook + polling
patterns.description: Subscribe to a webhook via API, then poll /payloads to retrieve change deltas.

triggers.name: Record created
triggers.description: Fires when a new record is added to a table (via webhook subscription).

triggers.name: Record updated
triggers.description: Fires when a record's fields change.

triggers.name: Record deleted
triggers.description: Fires when a record is deleted.

triggers.name: Record enters view
triggers.description: Fires when a record's properties change such that it now matches a view's filter.

actions.name: Create record
actions.description: Create one or more records in a table.

actions.name: Update record
actions.description: Update fields on an existing record.

actions.name: List records
actions.description: Query records from a table with optional filtering and sorting.

actions.name: Find record
actions.description: Get a single record by ID.

auth.description: Personal Access Token used as Authorization: Bearer. Scoped per-base.
